name: flutter_inapp_purchase
description: Open-source Flutter IAP plugin aligned with OpenIAP spec, supporting StoreKit 2 and Play Billing 8 via type-safe bindings.

seo.title: flutter_inapp_purchase — In-app Purchase Optimization
seo.meta_description: flutter_inapp_purchase: Open-source Flutter IAP plugin aligned with OpenIAP spec, supporting StoreKit 2 and Play Billing 8 via type-safe bindings.

when_to_use: Cross-platform IAP with StoreKit 2 and Play Billing 8 via single Flutter plugin
Type-safe IAP bindings for Flutter apps aligning with OpenIAP spec
Implementing consumable, non-consumable, and subscription IAPs in Flutter
Open-source IAP alternative to revenue cat for Flutter-first teams

pros: OpenIAP-aligned API across iOS and Android
Type-safe Dart bindings reduce runtime surprises
cons: Still a low-level library, not a paywall service
IAP edge cases require custom server validation
Breaking changes possible as OpenIAP evolves
You own analytics and subscription state yourself
review.verdict: Solid Flutter IAP base if you want to own the stack, but you still need receipt validation and paywalls on top.
review.best_for: Flutter teams wanting OpenIAP-aligned IAP without a managed backend.
review.not_for: Teams that prefer fully managed subscription infrastructure.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free/open-source — no commercial pricing, no HWM.
